title: Best Makeup and Hairstyling - 2026 Oscars
text: Winner: Frankenstein (Netflix) - Mike Hill, Jordan Samuel, and Cliona Furey. Nominees: Kokuho (GKIDS) – Kyoko Toyokawa, Naomi Hibino, Tadashi Nishimatsu; Sinners (Warner Bros.) – Ken Diaz, Mike Fontaine, Shunika Terry; The Smashing Machine (A24) – Kazu Hiro, Glen Griffin, Bjoern Rehbein; The Ugly Stepsister (Independent Film Company/Shudder) – Thomas Foldberg, Anne Cathrine Sauerberg. The Netflix adaptation of Frankenstein took home the award in this category at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony held on March 15, 2026.
